title: Context-aware code suggestions from selected text
body:
# Context-Aware Code Suggestions

Allow users to select code in the editor and send it to the AI assistant for context-aware responses.

## Requirements
- [ ] Detect selected text when user sends a message (Shift+Enter or custom shortcut)
- [ ] Include file path, line numbers, and surrounding context in the prompt
- [ ] Support multiple selection ranges
- [ ] Show context indicator in chat input (e.g., "📎 3 lines from Main.java")
- [ ] Respect max token limits when adding context

## Acceptance Criteria
- Selected code is included in API requests automatically
- Context preview shows which files/lines are being sent
- No performance degradation on large selections
